## Mechanism

For every recorded row in the deterministic q191..q383 post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding boundary, the current post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor obstruction prime is excluded by the q-avoiding residue condition; smaller primes are inherited as non-obstructions; the first later prime with roots of y*(y+delta)+1 modulo s^2 gives a row-uniform post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor square-obstruction child for every descendant class of that row.

## Boundary

This packet batch-classifies the q191..q383 post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding boundary: all 124948172109189798223447033533750138554613507343879586729927215881345 source classes have a row-uniform later square-obstruction child by prime 389. It does not close the 249896344218379596446894067067500277109227014687759173459854431762690 post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor root children, the 15536502041475313965667995966751777712392869680929624929606057703977518271 post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding classes, the p479 branches, q97, p443-unavailable, the p4217 complement, collision-free matching, or Problem 848.
